title: Evaluation Record
description: Schema for evaluation records that capture benchmark results, metrics, and attestation for registry artifacts. Provider-agnostic: any evaluation framework (eval-hub, Garak, lm-evaluation-harness, RAGAS, or custom) can submit results conforming to this envelope.

category.description: Evaluation category. 'functional' for capability/accuracy, 'safety' for alignment/harm prevention, 'red-team' for adversarial attack testing, 'performance' for latency/throughput, 'custom' for provider-defined types.

provider.description: Optional evaluation framework/provider that produced these results.

benchmark.description: The benchmark or evaluation suite used.

evaluator.description: Who or what performed the evaluation.

results.description: Evaluation results including overall score and per-metric breakdowns.

context.description: Environmental and temporal context of the evaluation run.

attestation.description: Optional cryptographic attestation of the evaluation results.

Provider.description: Evaluation framework or provider that produced these results. The registry treats providers as opaque — any string is accepted.

url.description: URL for the provider project or documentation.

Benchmark.description: Identification of the benchmark or evaluation suite.

identity.description: Name or identifier of the evaluator (e.g., 'ci-pipeline', 'human-review-team', 'eval-service-v2').

method.description: Evaluation method. 'automated' for CI/CD pipelines and scripts, 'human' for manual review, 'hybrid' for a combination.

version.description: Version of the evaluation tooling or harness.

TaskResult.description: Result for a specific task or category within the evaluation.

passed.description: Whether the task met its passing criteria.

details.description: Additional details or notes about the task result.

EvalContext.description: Environmental context for the evaluation run.

modelVersion.description: Specific model version or checkpoint used during evaluation.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the evaluation was performed.

duration.description: Total duration of the evaluation run (e.g., '45m', '2.5h').

Attestation.description: Cryptographic attestation of evaluation results for tamper-evidence.

signature.description: Base64-encoded cryptographic signature over the evaluation results.

signedBy.description: Identity of the signer (e.g., key ID, email, or URI).
